title: Neoalsomitra clavigera
taxonomy: Neoalsomitra clavigera is a species of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. It belongs to the genus Neoalsomitra, which is a group of plants native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant is further classified into the order Brassicales and the class Magnoliopsida, indicating its place within the larger plant kingdom. The classification of Neoalsomitra clavigera is also supported by molecular studies that have confirmed its placement within the Capparaceae family. The specific classification of Neoalsomitra clavigera highlights the complexity and diversity of plant life on our planet.
